'''jobasaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:puboiliac|puboiliac]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-b-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:puboiliac|puboiliac]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| jobasaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jobasithi|jobasithi]] || [[word:jobasiji|jobasiji]] || [[word:jobasishi|jobasishi]] || [[word:jobasiki|jobasiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jobasuthuthu|jobasuthuthu]] || [[word:jobasujuju|jobasujuju]] || [[word:jobasushushu|jobasushushu]] || [[word:jobasukuku|jobasukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jobasuthu|jobasuthu]] || [[word:jobasuju|jobasuju]] || [[word:jobasushu|jobasushu]] || [[word:jobasuku|jobasuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jobasufthuf|jobasufthuf]] || [[word:jobasufjuf|jobasufjuf]] || [[word:jobasufshuf|jobasufshuf]] || [[word:jobasufkuf|jobasufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jobasethe|jobasethe]] || [[word:jobaseje|jobaseje]] || [[word:jobaseshe|jobaseshe]] || [[word:jobaseke|jobaseke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jobasothotho|jobasothotho]] || [[word:jobasojojo|jobasojojo]] || [[word:jobasoshosho|jobasoshosho]] || [[word:jobasokoko|jobasokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jobasotho|jobasotho]] || [[word:jobasojo|jobasojo]] || [[word:jobasosho|jobasosho]] || [[word:jobasoko|jobasoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jobasofthof|jobasofthof]] || [[word:jobasofjof|jobasofjof]] || [[word:jobasofshof|jobasofshof]] || [[word:jobasofkof|jobasofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:jobas챦fth챦f|jobas챦fth챦f]] || [[word:jobas챦fj챦f|jobas챦fj챦f]] || [[word:jobas챦fsh챦f|jobas챦fsh챦f]] || [[word:jobas챦fk챦f|jobas챦fk챦f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:jobas챦fth챦fth챦f|jobas챦fth챦fth챦f]] || [[word:jobas챦fj챦fj챦f|jobas챦fj챦fj챦f]] || [[word:jobas챦fsh챦fsh챦f|jobas챦fsh챦fsh챦f]] || [[word:jobas챦fk챦fk챦f|jobas챦fk챦fk챦f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:jobas챦fth챦f|jobas챦fth챦f]] || [[word:jobas챦fj챦f|jobas챦fj챦f]] || [[word:jobas챦fsh챦f|jobas챦fsh챦f]] || [[word:jobas챦fk챦f|jobas챦fk챦f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:jobas챦fth챦f|jobas챦fth챦f]] || [[word:jobas챦fj챦f|jobas챦fj챦f]] || [[word:jobas챦fsh챦f|jobas챦fsh챦f]] || [[word:jobas챦fk챦f|jobas챦fk챦f]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jobas챈th챈|jobas챈th챈]] || [[word:jobas챈j챈|jobas챈j챈]] || [[word:jobas챈sh챈|jobas챈sh챈]] || [[word:jobas챈k챈|jobas챈k챈]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jobasathatha|jobasathatha]] || [[word:jobasajaja|jobasajaja]] || [[word:jobasashasha|jobasashasha]] || [[word:jobasakaka|jobasakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jobasatha|jobasatha]] || [[word:jobasaja|jobasaja]] || [[word:jobasasha|jobasasha]] || [[word:jobasaka|jobasaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jobasafthaf|jobasafthaf]] || [[word:jobasafjaf|jobasafjaf]] || [[word:jobasafshaf|jobasafshaf]] || [[word:jobasafkaf|jobasafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:jobasasha|jobasasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:jobash챘sha|jobash챘sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jobasrosha|jobasrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jobasmusha|jobasmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:jobasyasha|jobasyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojobasnksh챘sha|gojobasnksh챘sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojobasnkrosha|gojobasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojobasnkmusha|gojobasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojobasnkyasha|gojobasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:jobabasasha|jobabasasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jobabash챘sha|jobabash챘sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jobabasrosha|jobabasrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jobabasmusha|jobabasmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jobabasyasha|jobabasyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojobabasnksh챘sha|gojobabasnksh챘sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojobabasnkrosha|gojobabasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojobabasnkmusha|gojobabasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojobabasnkyasha|gojobabasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:jeb챈sasha|jeb챈sasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jeb챈sh챘sha|jeb챈sh챘sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jeb챈srosha|jeb챈srosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jeb챈smusha|jeb챈smusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jeb챈syasha|jeb챈syasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojeb챈snksh챘sha|gojeb챈snksh챘sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojeb챈snkrosha|gojeb챈snkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojeb챈snkmusha|gojeb챈snkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojeb챈snkyasha|gojeb챈snkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:jobfasasha|jobfasasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jobfash챘sha|jobfash챘sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jobfasrosha|jobfasrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jobfasmusha|jobfasmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jobfasyasha|jobfasyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojobfasnksh챘sha|gojobfasnksh챘sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojobfasnkrosha|gojobfasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojobfasnkmusha|gojobfasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojobfasnkyasha|gojobfasnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
